issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label, regime=bull/CAUTION, label=D, sample_size=129, window=100, alerts=['label_imbalance'], expected_win_rate=0.093, expected_pnl=-0.0071, expected_quality=-0.1705, layers=1→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(0.5742→0.7312)/feat_4h_dist_swing_low(3.2662→3.1623)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.199→0.2518), exact_live_lane=(rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None), scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; regime_label+entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']; entry_quality_label:rows=0,wr=None,q=None,dd=None,tuw=None,alerts=['no_rows']
